hero.title: Your family story, alive and shareable
hero.subtitle: Build interactive trees, enrich every member and invite your family, all on a canvas designed for genealogy.

featuresSection.title: Everything to build your tree
featuresSection.subtitle: Simple, powerful tools to document, explore and pass on your lineage.

trees.title: Interactive trees
trees.description: Visualize and organize your family on an intuitive canvas with generations and unions.

search.title: Search & timeline
search.description: Find any family member and browse your family history year by year.

share.title: Secure sharing
share.description: Invite relatives as viewers or co-editors, no account required to explore the demo.

privacy.title: Protected data
privacy.description: Your trees belong to you. Secure authentication and granular access control.

1.title: Create your tree
1.description: Sign up for free and add the first members of your family.

2.title: Enrich profiles
2.description: Dates, places, photos and relationships, everything in one canvas.

3.title: Share with family
3.description: Invite relatives to view or co-edit the tree securely.

finalCta.title: Ready to explore your roots?
finalCta.subtitle: Join geneamap for free or try the demo tree without signing up.

organisation.title: Map your organization on a living canvas
organisation.subtitle: Build an interactive org chart: managers, teams, roles and photos. Share read-only or co-edit with colleagues.
bullets: Logo or brand background on the canvas
organisation.previewBody: Clear hierarchy, draggable cards, filterable levels — ideal for HR, onboarding or internal presentations.

hierarchy.title: Flexible hierarchy
hierarchy.description: Managers, reports, numbered levels — adapt the structure to your organization.

collab.title: Collaboration
collab.description: Invite viewers or editors, just like a family tree.

share.title: Controlled sharing
share.description: Private, shared or public read-only link.

export.title: PDF export
export.description: Download your org chart for presentations (paid plans).

organisation.finalSubtitle: Create your first org chart in minutes — free Discovery trial (20 people, 30 days).
